reviews.comment:
Por ser una estación de un pueblo chiquito tiene todo. Muy lindos los baños!

(Translated by Google)
For a station in a small town, it has everything. The bathrooms are very nice!

reviews.comment:
Buena atención como todas las YPF falta  comida calenté así se pasa mejor el viaje

(Translated by Google)
Good service, like all YPF stations, but they need hot food to make the trip more enjoyable.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Very good
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKOVoyY2Z3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy muy muy atentos todos, muy buena gente. Las medias lunas calentitas recién horneadas, y café. Muy ricos. Super recomendable. Las cosas dulces de la vendedora artesanal, afuera de la cafeteria, muy ricas tambien

(Translated by Google)
Everyone was incredibly attentive and friendly. The croissants were warm and freshly baked, and the coffee was delicious. Highly recommended. The sweets from the artisan vendor outside the café were also very tasty.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKMW9iV1dnEAE

reviews.comment:
Mala atencion el el mini market los baños sucios muy lentos en la carga de combustible pero atienden bien

(Translated by Google)
Poor service at the mini-market, dirty bathrooms, very slow fueling, but the service is good.
